untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a 'broadening top' pattern formation with specific points (A, B, C) and directional movement analysis. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic that cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and basic operators. Pattern identification (formation recognition, point labeling, apex/high detection) is beyond the scope of the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Entry condition simplified to 'price begins heading down' (close < prev_high). Exit stop-loss set to 0.15 as specified in source text. The core pattern recognition requirement (identifying broadening top formation and its specific points A, B, C) cannot be translated without a dedicated pattern detection indicator. Recommend implementing a dedicated broadening_top_pattern indicator or using multi-bar logic outside this rule engine.
